name: Leg Press
setup: Sit on leg press machine, back flat against pad
Adjust seat so knees are at ~90 degrees at start
execution: Press platform away until legs extended (not locked)
Control weight back to start position
Don't let weight stack touch down between reps
common_mistakes: Lower back lifting off pad (butt tuck under)
cues: Push through entire foot, not just toes
Stop before lockout to keep tension on quads
Keep hips planted on the seat
advantages: Can load heavily with minimal spinal stress
